place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: High-Standing Three-Bedroom Pool Villa with Office, Lamai
blurb: A high-standing three-bedroom pool villa in the Lamai hills, with a dedicated home office, warm timber-and-green interiors and a private pool on a generous 661 m² plot. Single-storey living, three en-suite bedrooms and a mountain backdrop. ฿12,500,000.
detail:
Set on a generous 661 m² plot in the Lamai hills, this single-storey villa is a step above the usual — 384 m² of built space finished in warm timber, soft greens and natural stone, arranged around a private pool with a mountain backdrop. It's a short drive from Lamai's beach, restaurants and amenities.

Beyond the three en-suite bedrooms, the layout adds a dedicated home office — a genuine rarity here, and ideal for remote work or a study. The open living level pairs a green-and-timber designer kitchen with living and dining areas that open to the pool terrace, all air-conditioned and delivered fully furnished.

Outside, the pool runs alongside a sun terrace, lawn and a covered sala framed by tropical planting. The villa is held on a registered leasehold with approximately 27 years and 10 months remaining, running to May 2054. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory on request.
